tasks.label: push-jenil-ui
tasks.command: git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD && if [ -f .git/MERGE_HEAD ]; then GIT_EDITOR=true git merge --abort || true; fi && rm -f .git/.MERGE_MSG.swp && git checkout jenil-ui && git add -A && (git commit -m "Update UI and profile features" || true) && git pull --rebase origin jenil-ui && git push origin jenil-ui

tasks.label: merge-push-main
tasks.command: git checkout main && git pull origin main && git merge jenil-ui && git push origin main && git status --short --branch

tasks.label: merge-jenil-main-noeditor
tasks.command: git checkout main && git pull origin main && rm -f .git/.MERGE_MSG.swp && GIT_EDITOR=true git merge --no-edit jenil-ui && git push origin main && git rev-parse HEAD && git status --short --branch

tasks.label: push-main-latest
tasks.command: cd /Users/jenilgadhiya/Desktop/lookit && export GIT_PAGER=cat && git checkout main && git add -A && (git commit -m "Push latest dashboard updates" || true) && git pull --rebase origin main && git push origin main && git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD && git rev-parse --short HEAD

tasks.label: push-main-latest
tasks.command: cd /Users/jenilgadhiya/Desktop/lookit && export GIT_PAGER=cat && git checkout main && git add -A && (git commit -m "Push latest dashboard updates" || true) && git pull --rebase origin main && git push origin main && git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD && git rev-parse --short HEAD

tasks.label: push-main-latest
tasks.command: git checkout main && git add -A && (git commit -m "Push latest changes" || true) && git pull --rebase origin main && git push origin main

tasks.label: pull-main-latest
tasks.command: git checkout main && git pull origin main
